title: Big Changes in India’s Labour Laws (Quick Breakdown)
description: India’s new labour codes have replaced 29 older laws, bringing major changes to wages, job security, gig-worker benefits and workplace rules.From the “employee vs worker” classification to fixed-term benefits, social security for gig workers and new layoff rules — here’s everything you need to know in under a minute.Stay informed about policies that impact your job, salary and future.
